case_title: CKS PRIME INVESTMENTS LLC VS. KRISTINA CORDERO ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: FEES (TRANSACTION ID # 210047570) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CKS PRIME INVESTMENTS LLC

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CKS PRIME INVESTMENTS LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CORDERO, KRISTINA AN INDIVIDUAL $5,382.84 PRINCIPAL, $900.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $279.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,562.34, SEE SCANNED DOC
SUMMONS ISSUED (TRANSACTION ID # 210013104) TO PLAINTIFF CKS PRIME INVESTMENTS LLC
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF APPLICATION FOR DEFAULT JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO 1788.60(A) (TRANSACTION ID # 210047570) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CKS PRIME INVESTMENTS LLC

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 210015512), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CKS PRIME INVESTMENTS LLC SERVED AUG-31-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CORDERO, KRISTINA AN INDIVIDUAL
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-26-2023 CONTINUED TO NOV-28-2023 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 210013104) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CKS PRIME INVESTMENTS LLC AS TO DEFENDANT CORDERO, KRISTINA AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 THROUGH 10 INCLUSIVE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED
CIVIL CASE COVERSHEET FILED (TRANSACTION ID # 210013104) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CKS PRIME INVESTMENTS LLC
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, E-FILING REJECT, (TRANSACTION ID # 210038696) SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF CKS PRIME INVESTMENTS LLC AS TO DEFENDANT CORDERO, KRISTINA AN INDIVIDUAL
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-26-2023 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $279.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 210047570) AS TO DEFENDANT CORDERO, KRISTINA AN INDIVIDUAL

DECLARATION RE: NON SERVICE (TRANSACTION ID # 210047570) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CKS PRIME INVESTMENTS LLC
